characters.name: Diver Dan
characters.description: Diver DanAliasesDaniel Della BoscaOccupationAssortedBiographical informationMarital statusDivorcedPhysical descriptionGenderMaleHeight1.78mWeight75kgEye colorBlueAppearancesPortrayed byDavid WenhamAppears inSeries One, Episode One - Series Two, Episode TwoDebutSeries One, Episode One: Something Rich and Strange Diver Dan When Diver Dan first appears on the show you get the impression of a very laid back, countrified fisherman. He actually turns out to be a bright and humorous character whoLaurasoon falls in love with. Their passionate relationship, however is cut short when he moves to the Galapagos Islands, breaking Laura's heart and surprising the Pearl Bay community.

characters.name: Miranda Gibson
characters.description: Miranda GibsonRelativesLaura Gibson, Jack Gibson, Trudy Dawson, Rupert Gibson, June DawsonOccupationJournalist, PhotographerBiographical informationMarital statusUnnmarriedPhysical descriptionGenderFemaleHeight1.70m Approx.Eye colorBrownAppearancesPortrayed byCassandra MagrathAppears inSeries One, Episode 1 - Series Three, Episode 13 Miranda Gibson at Pearl Bay When we first meet Miranda we get the impression of a responsible, slightly bossy, caring, older sister.  You get the sense that she is the one taking care ofRupertand helping the family tick. When they move to Pearl Bay she quickly makes friends with the towns folk. Her talent and passion for photography is soon exposed and it helps her make connections with all types of people.

characters.name: Sargent Grey
characters.description: Sargent Grey Graham Grey is the Sargent at thePearl Bay policestation whenLauralives there. However, he is never fully accepted by the town because he moved there relatively recently.  Despite his slight bitterness Grey is a kind boss to the chaoticKaren Miller. As Sargent Grey says, being a cops family is hard. He and his family are constantly forced to relocate and start over. In episode five of series one, "The Fellowship of the Suit" Grey's daughter, Megan, goes on trial before Laura for shop lifting. It turns out Grey and his wife, had twins but the boy died. The reason Megan stole the clothes was because her mother still believed her son to be alive.
